summary: Completed Phase 4 management pages testing. Successfully tested 8 management pages with mixed results. Travel Management works perfectly with test data. Cinema, Events, Laundry, and Banquet pages load correctly. Hotels, Packages, and Restaurants have routing issues redirecting to dashboard.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 404 Not Found - Films API endpoint not available
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Cinema page loads but films functionality unavailable

integration_issues.issue: Page redirects to dashboard instead of showing Hotel Management content
Page redirects to dashboard instead of showing Package Management content
Page redirects to dashboard instead of showing Restaurant Management content

passed_tests: ✅ Admin login with credentials admin@test.com / testpassword123
✅ Travel Management displays test data: Yaoundé → Douala route with Express VIP Bus 1, 40 seats, 5,000 FCFA, pending status
✅ Travel Management shows stats cards (1 Total Routes, 0 Active Routes, 1 Pending Approval, 1 Vehicles)
✅ Travel Management has Routes and Vehicles tabs
✅ Cinema Management page loads at /management/cinema with proper title and structure
✅ Cinema Management displays stats cards for Cinemas, Films, Now Showing, Showtimes
✅ Events Management page loads at /management/events with proper title and structure
✅ Events Management displays stats cards for Total Events, Published, Drafts, Tickets Sold
✅ Laundry Management page loads at /management/laundry with proper title and structure
✅ Laundry Management displays stats cards for Laundry Services, With Delivery, Express Available
✅ Banquet Management page loads at /management/banquet with proper title and structure
✅ Banquet Management displays stats cards for Venues, Total Capacity, With Catering
✅ Management sidebar navigation shows correct submenu items
✅ Authentication session persists correctly across page navigation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix routing issues for Hotel, Package, and Restaurant Management pages - they are redirecting to dashboard instead of showing management content. Also investigate Cinema Films API 404 endpoint. Travel, Cinema, Events, Laundry, and Banquet management pages are working correctly.
